examples: Lazio trounced Cagliari 4-1 at the Stadio Sant 'elia in Sardegna while Sampdoria held current champions Inter to a 1-1 draw.
The MINI WRC Team is back on world championship duty for the first time since its debut on Rally Italia Sardegna in early May.
Armindo Araujo will start his second event in MINI's John Cooper Works WRC following his debut in the car on Rally d'Italia Sardegna last month.
